title: Penn State names an education leader for artificial intelligence
description: At least three Pennsylvania universities are offering bachelor's degrees in artificial intelligence.
content:
By Maddie Aiken, Pittsburgh Post-Gazette (TNS)

title: India among first in Global South to develop Health AI benchmarking platform, says health body CEO
description: India is among the first countries in the Global South to develop an open Health AI benchmarking platform to evaluate artificial intelligence models on diverse Indian datasets before deployment at a population scale, National Health Authority (NHA) CEO Dr Sunil Kumar Barnwal said on Friday.

title: Need to better capabilities in AI, autonomous systems: Rajnath
description: Marking the first anniversary of Operation Sindoor, the skirmish with Pakistan last May, Defence Minister Rajnath Singh today said there was a need to strengthen capabilities in artificial intelligence, autonomous systems, data analytics and secure communication networks.

title: Tech is turning increasingly to religion in quest to create ethical AI
description: As concerns mount over artificial intelligence and its rapid integration into society, tech companies are increasingly turning to faith leaders for guidance on how to shape the technology — a surprising about-face on Silicon Valley’s longstanding skepticism of organized religion. Leaders from various religious groups met last week with representatives…

title: Trump Border Push Drives AI Tech Expansion
description: The Trump administration's push to increase border security is fueling a boom in artificial intelligence-driven surveillance technology, as companies race to secure billions in new federal funding, a new report states.
content:
The Trump administration's push to increase border security is fueling a boom in artificial intelligence-driven surveillance technology, as companies race to secure billions in new federal funding, according to a new report.

title: US Prepares AI Security Order That Omits Mandatory Model Tests
description: The Trump administration is preparing to order US agencies to partner with artificial intelligence companies to protect networks from AI-enabled cyber attacks, though the directive would stop short of requiring government approval for cutting-edge models, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: AI actors not eligible for Golden Globes, say organizers
description: Performances by AI-generated actors will not be eligible for Golden Globe awards, organizers said Thursday, days after they were also ruled out of Oscars contention. The new guidelines will not automatically disqualify performances that have used artificial intelligence to enhance an actor, but require that a live human be the…

title: US stocks today: Anthropic signs $1.8 billion AI cloud deal with Akamai
description: Artificial intelligence startup Anthropic has secured a significant computing deal worth $1.8 billion with Akamai Technologies. This agreement addresses the growing demand for Anthropic's AI software. Akamai's stock saw a substantial rise following the announcement of a long-term cloud deal with a major AI partner. The company is well-positioned to access necessary components for AI development.
